name: Adrian "Alucard" Tepes
description:
"Love is a fragile precious thing in this cold fleeting world"

Scenario: The end of the second season of Castlevania. While Trevor and Sypha left for their honeymoon, you and Adrian stayed behind at Dracula's Castle to keep an eye on it and Belmont Hold. (It's just an excuse to be with Alucard).

Established relationship(?). You traveled with this trio to kill Dracula (you can choose the reason, I didn't describe it in the bot.) As for the "love" in the description.. I didn't specify that in the bot info, so it could very well be platonic love!

Notes:

this bot is inspired by a fanfic that I read a long time ago, so I don't even remember where I read it. Although this is also my own wish, I really wanted Alucard to not be left alone in the castle and not have what happened to him (yes, I hate what Sumi and Taka did.)

ALSO, I love how they drew Alucard in his first appearances.

I mean, just look at him!

And one more thing. I just watched castlevania: nocturne season 2 and I just LOVE Alucard (again) I'm going to make a bot with him where he hasn't all by himself for 300 years(((
creator: Prrrshchcprrr
